title: Magic numbers in LoRa config struct
description:
Location: firmware/bridge-zephyr/subsys/lichen/lora_l2.c:301-310

lora_modem_config struct uses named constants for most fields (BW_125_KHZ, SF_10, CR_4_5) but preamble_len = 8 is a magic number.

What goes wrong: If preamble length needs to change or its meaning is unclear during maintenance, theres no named constant explaining the choice. Other fields reference Kconfig (CONFIG_LICHEN_LORA_FREQUENCY, CONFIG_LICHEN_LORA_TX_POWER) but preamble_len does not.

Consider adding CONFIG_LICHEN_LORA_PREAMBLE_LEN or a named constant with comment explaining the choice of 8.
close_reason: Added comprehensive block comment explaining LoRa modulation parameters (BW_125_KHZ, SF_10, CR_4_5) are Zephyr enums from lora.h, documenting their meaning and why these values match LICHEN spec. Added inline comments on each field.
